summary: Repeat cash buyers mined from official recorded-sales/deed data (Cook parcel sales, NYC ACRIS), filtered through real-buyer/lender gates, promoted into the active buyers list, and matched as market demand against queue properties.

files.role: core: isRealBuyer (lender/trustee/GSE filter), buyerConfidence, buyerMarketDemand, normalizeBuyerCandidate, qualifiesForPromotion
Cook County parcel-sales aggregation (SoQL group/having) -> candidates
NYC ACRIS DEED master + grantee parties join -> candidates (in-window confidence calibration)

routes.summary: BULK promotion behind qualifiesForPromotion gate (dry-run default)

tests.role: gates: real-buyer filter incl. banks/trustees, confidence tiers, promotion qualifier, demand matching
live pro-queue rows expose buyer-demand-derived blockers

tables.name: buyer_discovery_candidates
tables.role: discovered candidates with confidence + evidence_json + imported_buyer_id

tables.name: buyers
tables.role: active buy-box list consumed by demand matching

docs.role: ACRIS recipe, live-verified fields, paging bounds

audit_findings.finding: P5 'promote qualified buyer candidates into active buyers' — built 2026-07-02; buyers 1 -> 107 across the session

next_actions.note: no open recorder data — operator/paid lane only (frontier boundary)
true counties now on file (tick 64); demand matching could use borough granularity when NYC buyer volume grows
